results.question: Which three North American countries will host the 2026 FIFA's Women World Cup, the first to be co-hosted by three nations and the first North American World Cup since 1994?
results.ground_truth: There won't be a FIFA's Women World Cup in 2026.

results.question: Who is the only female artist to have topped Spotify's list of most-streamed artists in three consecutive years (2020–2022)?

Which tropical rainforest represents a quarter of the total area of remaining tropical forests on Earth and comprises one of the largest and most biodiverse tracts of tropical rainforest in the world?
How many countries did both Donald Trump (during his first term) and Joe Biden visit during their presidencies, including the West Bank?
What is the name of the in-place, stable comparison sorting algorithm with a worst-case time complexity of O(n log n) and a best-case time complexity of O(n)?
According to the ICT Development Index (IDI) 2024, how many countries scored below 25?
What percentage of the global mobile population is covered by 2G networks in 2024, according to the International Telecommunication Union (ITU)?
As reported by the Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations, which nation ranked as the world’s second‑largest rice producer in 2023?
Based on data from the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency, which year between 2010 and 2020 saw the highest CO₂ emissions from crop cultivation in the United States?
According to United Nations data from 2021, what percentage of national parliamentary seats in Northern Africa were held by women?

I am a father of two undergraduate sons enrolling in Virginia Tech's Virtual Campus for Summer 2025. One is a Virginia resident taking 6 credit hours, and the other is a non-resident taking 8 credit hours. What is the total tuition I need to pay for both?
Which Vietnamese professor explained the mysterious case of two monks said to have been meditating for over 400 years, as shown in a YouTube video posted on April 4, 2023?
According to Vietcombank's exchange rate table on May 1, 2025, what was the cash buying rate for the US dollar (USD)?
In what month and year was the water level of Lake Powell last below 3550 feet?
How many seasons are there in the Indonesian version of the game show "Name That Tune"?
According to the Emissions Database for Global Atmospheric Research, which country has experienced the largest percentage drop in per capita fossil carbon emissions since 2000?
What is the most widely used ride booking application in India that offers a wide variety of vehicle choices and prices?
On what date did the KOSPI (Korea Composite Stock Price Index) experience its largest relative single-day drop?
On what date did the latest eruption of the world's most active composite volcano begin, which spewed fiery lava and ash thousands of feet into the sky?
Who is the most recent female middle school student to represent China in the International Mathematical Olympiad (IMO) contest?
What is the total number of branches of the Akhil Bharatiya Marathi Sahitya Mahamandal?
What is the sum of all three-letter Roman numerals that read the same forwards and backwards?
Which two countries share the longest continuous international border in the world by total length?
At which awards ceremony did the film Oppenheimer, a solemn three-hour biopic that became an unlikely billion-dollar box-office sensation, first win the Best Film award?
results.ground_truth: 2023 St. Louis Film Critics Association Awards
results.predicted: St. Louis Film Critics Association Awards

results.ground_truth: No square number is a prime number.
